description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The facade is predominantly white with a contrasting dark gray section on the rear, featuring large rectangular windows that allow ample natural light. Two spacious terraces flank the upper level, surfaced with a brown tile or wood-like material. The front of the house includes a recessed entryway with a green patch, possibly artificial grass, and a series of windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The rear section is distinguished by a vertical, dark gray panel that houses additional windows. The overall design emphasizes minimalism and functionality, with a focus on open, airy spaces and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed multi-story house with large windows, white and dark gray exterior, and two upper-level terraces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and green entry patch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the terrace, large windows, and the transition to the dark gray rear section.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a vertical dark gray panel with three rows of windows and flanking terraces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing terrace access, window variety, and the edge of the dark gray rear section.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with a green patch, no porch or columns, minimalistic modern door
